creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
--On April 27, 2008 3:37:11 PM +0000 araujo@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: security/sguil-client, port upgrade, new version
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: araujo
> State-Changed-When: Sun Apr 27 15:36:59 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why:
> This patch is malformed impossible to apply this.  You should re-work
> this patch and send again.  If you have some doubts how make this,
> please see this URL.
> http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/FreeBSD/How-to-submit-a-diff.txt
>
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122645

A single patch for the entire port is attached.

Paul Schmehl (pauls@utdallas.edu)
Senior Information Security Analyst
The University of Texas at Dallas
http://www.utdallas.edu/ir/security/
